name: InputGroup
description: A component for grouping related input elements together with addons (prefix/suffix buttons, text, or icons) for a cohesive form control appearance.
usage_guidelines: Combine with Input, Select, or Button components.
Use for URL inputs, search fields, or currency inputs.

InputGroup.Addon.description: Addon element that attaches to the input as prefix or suffix.

styling_info.visual_description: Grouped input with seamless border connection between input and addons.

Do: Match addon size with input size

) } export default Addons
